work_experience_normalized.description: Process improvement projects, SOLs redaction, time management, workshop support, route management. Airbus software: CATIA V5, SAP.

Failure analysis of metallic and composite components based on visual inspection, material characterization, fractographic examination (macro and SEM) and JF metallographic studies. New developments, qualifications of materials, specified items, blanks, manufacturing Airbus processes and FPQs.

work_experience_normalized.position: Junior Project Manager Engineer at Application Development Department
work_experience_normalized.description: Optimization of heat treatments applied to structural components. Development of new methods for mechanical testing of sintered gears. Integrated design of sintered parts in collaboration with part producers and final users. As project engineer: development of advanced joining techniques (sinter-brazing) developed in cooperation with customers.

work_experience_normalized.position: Development Engineer at Materials Development Department
work_experience_normalized.description: Investigation of new materials for optimizing the performance of sintered components. Design of new materials based on the use of computational tools (ThermoCalc, JMatsPro). Optimization of processing parameters. Evaluation of performance using mechanical testing and microstructural evaluation.

work_experience_normalized.position: Master Thesis Worker at Material Development Department
work_experience_normalized.description: Research on the influence of boron as a microalloying element to be used in sintered structural components.

work_experience_normalized.description: Design and testing of thermal sensors used in tunnels. Deposition of semiconductive oxide layers on insulating substrates. Development of materials for electrodes in supercapacitors used in capacitive deionization.
